title: News-sentiment signal
question: Does news sentiment predict forward returns, or just react to past ones?
finding: Reactive, not predictive. Sentiment tracks the prior 20-day return (Spearman IC +0.20) ~3.2× more strongly than the matched forward 20-day (+0.06); the long-short forward-5-day spread is statistically zero. A trend mirror, not an entry signal.
